body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-8203", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:H/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Concrete CMS 9.5.0 and below has Stored XSS on the height parameter. The controller does not validate or sanitize $height. Any user with editor privileges can inject malicious JavaScript that executes in the context of any visitor's browser, potentially leading to session hijacking, credential theft, or other malicious actions.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00122, "percentile": 0.02269}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9v2g-37mp-qpxf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-24T18:10:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v2g-37mp-qpxf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9v2g-37mp-qpxf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8203"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:30:38Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8203", "https://documentation.concretecms.org/9-x/developers/introduction/version-history/951-release-notes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v2g-37mp-qpxf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/concretecms/concretecms", "summary": "Concrete CMS has Stored XSS through its height parameter", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-24T20:58:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9v2g-37mp-qpxf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "9.5.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "concrete5/concrete5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 9.5.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Concrete CMS has Stored XSS through its height parameter
